syntax_8963.creator: DereWah
syntax_8963.title: GPT Completion Request
syntax_8963.description:
Generate a completion of an input string using the OpenAI ChatGPT API, based on an input prompt.
ATTENTION! This syntax does not use the ChatGPT endpoint. You won't receive back a conversation from the AI, just a chat completion. It will try to predict what the message is, it won't respond as an assistant.
syntax_8963.syntax_pattern:
(generate|make) [a] [gpt] completion with (prompt|input) %string% [and model %-string%] [and max tokens %-number%] [and temperature %-number%]
(generate|make) [a] [gpt] completion with (prompt|input) %string% [and model %-string%] [and max tokens %-number%] [and temperature %-number%] without echo

en:
Generate a completion of an input string using the OpenAI ChatGPT API, based on an input prompt.
ATTENTION! This syntax does not use the ChatGPT endpoint. You won't receive back a conversation from the AI, just a chat completion. It will try to predict what the message is, it won't respond as an assistant.

syntax_8962.creator: DereWah
syntax_8962.title: GPT Chat Completion Request
syntax_8962.description: Generate a response to a prompt string using the OpenAI ChatGPT API, based on an input prompt.
syntax_8962.syntax_pattern:
(generate|make) [a] chat[gpt] completion with (prompt|input) %string% [and model %-string%] [and max tokens %-number%] [and temperature %-number%]
(generate|make) [a] chat[gpt] completion with conversation %conversationmessages% [and model %-string%] [and max tokens %-number%] [and temperature %-number%]

en: Generate a response to a prompt string using the OpenAI ChatGPT API, based on an input prompt.

syntax_8966.creator: DereWah
syntax_8966.title: GPT Content of Conversation Message
syntax_8966.description: Returns the content of a conversation message.

en: Returns the content of a conversation message.

syntax_8967.creator: DereWah
syntax_8967.title: GPT Role of Conversation Message
syntax_8967.description: Returns a string, which indicates the sender of the message. The role can only be either "system", "user" or "assistant".

en: Returns a string, which indicates the sender of the message. The role can only be either "system", "user" or "assistant".

syntax_8968.creator: DereWah
syntax_8968.title: Generated Prompt
syntax_8968.description: Returns the last generated response from a Chat Completion request. Call this immediately after sending a new chatgpt prompt, and save it into a variable.

en: Returns the last generated response from a Chat Completion request. Call this immediately after sending a new chatgpt prompt, and save it into a variable.

syntax_8969.creator: DereWah
syntax_8969.title: New Conversation Message
syntax_8969.description: Returns a conversation message type with a role and an empty content. if the [with role] part of the syntax is not specified, defaults to user.

en: Returns a conversation message type with a role and an empty content. if the [with role] part of the syntax is not specified, defaults to user.

syntax_8965.creator: DereWah
syntax_8965.title: Conversation Message
syntax_8965.description: This type holds information about a message in a conversation with ChatGPT. It has two main parts, the role (which can only be set to "assistant", "system" or "user") and the content, which is basically whatever string the user or the AI want to send.
syntax_8965.type_usage:
send "%conversationmessage%" #implicitly converting it into a string will show its content.
set {_c} to %string% parsed as conversation message #builds a string with default role "user"
generate chat completion with conversation %conversationmessages% #Use conversation persistence.

en: This type holds information about a message in a conversation with ChatGPT. It has two main parts, the role (which can only be set to "assistant", "system" or "user") and the content, which is basically whatever string the user or the AI want to send.
